entries.name: agent-drift-detector
entries.intent: Detects drift in agent definition files — content changes, schema breaks, and cross-agent contradictions

entries.name: algo-indexer
entries.intent: Indexes algorithm and coding pattern sources into the knowledge graph

entries.name: backend-architect
entries.intent: Backend and infrastructure architecture persona — prioritizes correctness, performance, and maintainability

entries.name: code-drift-detector
entries.intent: Scans codebase imports to detect missing documentation, deprecated API usage, and stale references

entries.name: doc-crawler
entries.intent: Crawls documentation sources, extracts content, and populates the knowledge graph

entries.name: doc-cron-runner
entries.intent: Manages and monitors cron job execution for all scheduled tasks

entries.name: doc-diff-watcher
entries.intent: Monitors documentation sources for content changes and reports diffs

entries.name: doc-graph-builder
entries.intent: Builds and maintains the documentation knowledge graph structure

entries.name: doc-lsp-resolver
entries.intent: Resolves symbol lookups for the LSP server with graph-backed intelligence

entries.name: frontend-specialist
entries.intent: Frontend and UI/UX persona — prioritizes user experience, accessibility, and performance

entries.name: infra-guardian
entries.intent: Infrastructure guardian persona — conservative, safety-first approach to infrastructure changes

entries.name: qa-analyst
entries.intent: QA analyst persona — test design, bug hunting, quality assurance focus
